title: catesbaea gamboana
intro: Catesbaea gamboana, also known as the Yellow Bird Plum or Gamboa Plum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Catesbaea gamboana include potential uses in treating fever, rheumatism, and other ailments, as well as providing anti-cancer and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve making teas, infusions, or decoctions from its bark, leaves, or flowers.
